scripts.predev: node --input-type=module -e "import { access } from 'node:fs/promises'; import { join } from 'node:path'; const paths = [join('node_modules','@fastify','cookie','package.json'), join('node_modules','react-router-dom','package.json')]; for (const p of paths) { try { await access(p) } catch { console.error('Missing dependency:', p, '\nFrom the repo root run: npm install'); process.exit(1) } }"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n fe,be -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
